india_trends.title: Global Market Today: Asian stocks, US futures climb on tech optimism
india_trends.summary: Asian stocks advanced, mirroring Wall Street's record highs driven by a tech surge and strong corporate earnings. Investors are closely watching the US-China summit and geopolitical developments in Iran, while inflation concerns fuel bets on Federal Reserve rate hikes next year.

india_trends.title: Breakout stocks to buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends five shares to buy today — 14 May 2026
india_trends.summary: The Indian stock market ended Tuesday's session on a higher note. Sumeet Bagadia of Choice Broking recommends five breakout stocks to buy today.

india_trends.title: Oil edges up ahead of Trump-Xi meeting in Beijing
india_trends.summary: Oil prices saw a slight increase as investors awaited the meeting between U.S. President Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping, with the Iran war a key focus. Despite U.S. sanctions, China remains a major buyer of Iranian oil, complicating efforts to resolve the conflict.

india_trends.title: India bans sugar exports until September 2026 to cool local prices
india_trends.summary: India has banned sugar exports until September 2026. This decision aims to manage domestic prices. The ban will impact global sugar markets, potentially benefiting Brazil and Thailand. Traders with existing contracts face challenges. Shipments already in the export pipeline will proceed under specif

india_trends.title: Metal stocks shine as global base metal rally lifts investor sentiment
india_trends.summary: Metal stocks surged on Tuesday, mirroring a sharp rally in global base metal prices driven by supply disruptions and robust demand. Gold loan firms also advanced following a government hike in customs duty on gold and silver, aimed at curbing imports and supporting domestic prices.

india_trends.title: Margin revival, Semaglutide launch to drive Dr Reddy’s growth momentum in FY27
india_trends.summary: Dr Reddy's Laboratories anticipates a gradual recovery this fiscal year. The company faced a profit drop last year due to US business pressures. However, operations in India, Europe, and emerging markets show healthy growth. New launches like Semaglutide and Abatacept are expected to drive future ex

india_trends.title: Sebi penalises Rashmi Saluja over alleged insider trading
india_trends.summary: SEBI has fined former Religare Enterprises chairperson Rashmi Saluja ₹40 lakh for insider trading violations. She traded Religare shares while possessing unpublished price-sensitive information about the Burman Group's open offer. Saluja has also been ordered to return ₹1.9 crore in unlawful gains w

india_trends.summary: On Wednesday, the regulator has proposed allowing municipalities to explicitly raise bonds for refinancing existing debt, while mandating detailed disclosures on lenders, repayment schedules, interest costs and any past restructuring. india_trends.title: Rupee slides to a fresh low for third straight day on oil hit
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee hit a new all-time low for the third consecutive day, driven by soaring crude oil prices and increased dollar demand. Despite government efforts to curb gold imports, the rupee weakened significantly. Traders anticipate further volatility, with the Reserve Bank of India intervening

india_trends.title: Trading volumes in unlisted shares plunge up to 70%
india_trends.summary: Investor interest in unlisted shares is decreasing. Trading volumes have fallen significantly. This slowdown is due to lower prices and fewer new share offerings. Some popular companies still see activity. However, demand has softened in sectors like defence and hospitality. A stronger stock market

india_trends.title: RBI expected to hold rates in June despite rising inflation, H2 rate hike bets emerge
india_trends.summary: Three out of twelve economists anticipate the Reserve Bank of India will raise policy rates this fiscal year due to inflation concerns, while others predict a prolonged pause. Most economists expect inflation to exceed RBI's forecast for FY27, with the bond market already pricing in tighter monetary

india_trends.title: India's gold rush meets a speeding ticket, but industry fears smuggling and job loss
india_trends.summary: The finance ministry increased the total import duty on gold, silver and platinum from 9.18% to 18.45%. The new rate includes 10% basic customs duty, 5% agriculture cess and 3.45% Integrated GST, up from 5%, 1% and 3.18% before.

india_trends.title: Airtel plans Rs 28,000 crore share swap: Deal with ICIL to raise parent’s stake in Airtel Africa & Mittal family’s stake in Airtel
india_trends.summary: Bharti Airtel's board approved a ₹28,220 crore share-swap deal with ICIL, a Mittal family entity, to increase its stake in Airtel Africa to 79%. This cashless transaction preserves company cash, boosts ICIL's holding in Bharti Airtel, and is expected to be accretive to earnings per share.
